title: Legal AI startup Jurisphere.ai raises $2.2 million in funding
description: Legal AI startup Jurisphere.ai has raised $2.2 million from four venture capital firms - Info Edge Ventures, Flourish Ventures, Antler and 8i Ventures.The funding was announced by co-founder Varun Khandelwal in a LinkedIn post.Khandelwal said that Jurisphere.ai has been used by over 500 teams across law firms, enterprises and public institutions over the past year. He added,“We’re evolving Jurisphere into a legal AI platform built for outcomes - combining our technology with a global network of
